zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia de Thwenge於大約1280年出生時，她的父親Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton27歲，母親Matilda Haunsard27歲。她去世於1347年1月8日在英國越可爾吉斯波洛享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia de Thwenge was born about 1280, her father, Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton, was 27 and her mother, Matilda Haunsard, was 27. She died on 8 January 1347, in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucia de Thwenge est née environ 1280, son père, Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Matilda Haunsard, avait 27 ans. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1347, à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia de Thwenge(이)가 대략 1280년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Haunsard(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1347년 1월 8일 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.
